meaning: 缂呯敻[涓滃崡浜氬浗瀹禲(鍗矪urma)
examples: Located in southwest China, Yunnan Province is a beautiful province bordering on Laos, Vietnam and Myanmar.
Yunnan Province is located in southwest China, enjoying geographical proximity to Myanmar, Laos and Vietnam.
America was among those who dismissed the new outfit as a talking shop, particularly since the likes of Myanmar were invited.
Even in the commercial heart of its largest city, religion remains central to life in Myanmar.
Nationwide, Muslims account for only about 4 percent of Myanmar's roughly 60 million people.
